title: Zhuangzi and the Case Against Meritocracy
abstract: Ever wondered how Zhuangzi would critique meritocracy? This tool not only sparks your imagination but also humorously explores why talent doesn't always determine destiny. Just like Zhuangzi's butterfly dream, it challenges the rational rules of our world and might make you rethink what success truly means. --Prepare to have your perceptions shifted!
abstract_zh: 你有没有想过，如果庄子来讨论“功利主义”会是个啥样？这工具不仅让你脑洞大开，还能用幽默的方式告诉你，为什么“才学”不一定能决定你的命运。就像庄周梦蝶一样，来看看现实中的那些看似合理的规则吧！——真的，看完你可能会重新定义“成功”。
